subject: Mount entire cassandra directory
commit_message:
Mount entire cassandra directory

Mounting only the cassandra/data directory causes any data not yet
persisted to be lost. Mounting the commitlog directory as well will
allow cassandra to persist data properly.

Change-Id: If4453e3b39307e0243c20167b568d4ac1af20d12
Issue-ID: OOM-1024
Signed-off-by: Daniel Silverthorn <daniel.silverthorn@amdocs.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

By default cassandra persistence is disabled.
Is this on purpose? Shouldn't it be enabled by default?

from aai-cassandra/values.yaml:
persistence:
  enabled: false

Patch Set 1:

> By default cassandra persistence is disabled.
 > Is this on purpose? Shouldn't it be enabled by default?
 > 
 > from aai-cassandra/values.yaml:
 > persistence:
 > enabled: false

I would have thought so, but this is how it was when the chart was added. Do you want me to change it?

Patch Set 1:

> > By default cassandra persistence is disabled.
 > > Is this on purpose? Shouldn't it be enabled by default?
 > >
 > > from aai-cassandra/values.yaml:
 > > persistence:
 > > enabled: false
 > 
 > I would have thought so, but this is how it was when the chart was
 > added. Do you want me to change it?

Yes, please do. Otherwise your fix has no effect and there is no persistence for cassandra.

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+2 Verified+1

Verified:
onap          aaa-aai-cassandra-0                         1/1       Running     0          5m
onap          aaa-aai-cassandra-1                         1/1       Running     0          3m
onap          aaa-aai-cassandra-2                         1/1       Running     0          3m
Change has been successfully merged by Borislav Glozman
